results.title: Scientists Create Synthetic Cell That Can Feed, Grow, and Replicate
results.description: Scientists say they have created a fully synthetic cell that can feed, grow, replicate its genome, and divide, marking a major step toward building life-like systems from non-living chemical components. The team from the University of Minnesota says its synthetic cell, called “SpudCell,” is the “first synthetic cell with a complete cell cycle.” Researchers say [...] The post Scientists Create Synthetic Cell That Can Feed, Grow, and Replicate appeared first on CBNC .
